branches.math_solver: Solves math problems using Wolfram Alpha.
branches.qa_validator: Scores answer quality with tags and feedback.
branches.image_generator: Creates visual assets from prompt input.
branches.self_learning: Learns from feedback and scoring loops.

concepts.tone: How Mythiq's response feels — friendly, serious, playful.
concepts.style: How content looks — bullets, highlights, etc.
concepts.persona_tuner: Changes how Mythiq speaks and responds.
